  ## Task Sync section - automation parsing rules
  ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1. This section MUST be the LAST section of this PR description.
     Anything written below it is parsed as part of this section.

  2. Put ONLY `TM#N` tags here (one per line, or comma-separated).
     • No descriptions, no parentheticals, no "(ref)" annotations
     • No keyword prefixes (Start:/Review:/Deploy:/Done:)

  3. Reference-only TM# (issues you merely mention, not close) belong in the
     body text ABOVE this section. They are ignored by the parser.

  4. To manually move an issue's column, post a PR COMMENT like:
       Done: TM#200
       Review: TM#201, TM#202
     Keywords in comments apply immediately (no need to wait for merge).

  5. If this section is empty or omitted, a new task issue will be
     auto-created on PR open and linked back here automatically.
